    DOWN - Enum constant in enum class src.SalaryStatus

    Gets the worker's name
    getSalary() - Method in class src.Worker
    Gets the worker's salary

    getStatus() - Method in class src.SalaryHistory

    S

    SalaryHistory - Class in src
    Records the history of salary adjustments for a worker

    Constructs a salary history record.
    SalaryStatus - Enum Class in src
    Enum representing the status of a salary modifier UP: Salary increased DOWN: Salary decreased

    Sets the worker's age

    U

    UP - Enum constant in enum class src.SalaryStatus
    increase salary

    V

    Validation - Class in src
    Utility class for validating user input Refactored to use instance methods where possible to reduce static dependency
    Validation(Scanner) - Constructor for class src.Validation
    Constructs a Validation instance with a specific Scanner
    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class src.SalaryStatus
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class src.SalaryStatus
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

    Represents a worker in the system which store personal information
